subparts.text: What are the main challenges faced by companies in international business? 1
What are the key institutions under the World Bank Group? 1
What is Technology Transfer? Give an example. 2
What are the main drivers of Globalization? 2
Explain the role of the Bretton Woods System and its impact on today’s international financial markets. 1
List three key factors that influence a country’s FDI inflow. 1
Explain the concept and constituents of balance of payments account. 1
Why do some governments impose tariff and non-tariff barriers despite promoting globalization? 2
Why do companies like McDonald's modify their menu for different countries? Explain with examples. 2
How has globalization affected local industries in developing countries? Provide examples of both positive and negative impacts. 2
